title: Victor's Workshop Christmas Tree Decorations 12pcs 6cm,Silver White Xmas Baubles Shatterproof Ball Ornaments Set
features: 【Original Design】Victor's Workshop is a retail brand with original design. This set of Christmas baubles belongs to the Snow Castle theme. It applies white and silver to create a elegant and wintery atmosphere.
【Shatterproof】Each Christmas ornament has sufficient thickness to prevent breakage. It remains intact even falling from 2 meters high onto hard floor.It is suitable for families with kids and pets.

【Exquisite Craftsmanship】 Christmas balls include 6 special finishes: shinny, matte, glitter, mottled, trasparent, frosted. Multi-finish and novelty shape ornaments meet all of your favorite tree ornaments,and the molding seam is almost invisible to make it looks exquisite.
【Complement to the Theme】12pcs baubles measure about 60mm. Matching our same theme of Christmas stocking, tree skirt, tree topper, wood hanging pendants, wood table decor, wreath and garland

【Firm Cap & Pre-tied String】The sturdy plastic caps are designed to support weights of up to 335ml water. Each Ornament also comes with a pre-tied string and it is easy for you to hang it to the Christmas tree.
